params.name: Worldwide Music Award
params.description:
Established on May 11, 1989, in Monte Carlo, the Worldwide Music Award is a prestigious recognition.
As an accolade recognized by the International Record Association, the Worldwide Music Award aims to encourage globally high-selling artists. The selection of award recipients is based on the sales performance of their works and the votes of fans worldwide. It has garnered attention in over a hundred countries, making it one of the significant honors in the music industry.
